title: Linked Context
description: Schema for bidirectional article-quant linking metadata embedded in research records

linked_quant_context.description: Quant records linked to this article record

linked_article_context.description: Article records linked to this quant record

linkEntry.description: A single link entry connecting this record to another

record_id.description: The ID of the linked record

relationship.description: The type of relationship between the records

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this link exists

topic_overlap.description: Shared topic tags between the linked records

link_score.description: Combined relevance score used to rank and threshold links
